india_trends.title: India’s urban unemployment rate eases to 6.6% in Jan-March quarter, rural joblessness rises to 4.3%
india_trends.summary: India's urban joblessness saw a slight dip to 6.6 percent in the first quarter of 2026. Rural unemployment, however, increased to 4.3 percent. india_trends.title: Explained: What is the new VB-G RAM G Act and how will it replace MGNREGA?
india_trends.summary: A new rural employment law, VB-G RAM G Act, will replace MGNREGA on July 1. It guarantees 125 days of work annually, focusing on infrastructure and climate resilience. india_trends.title: Oil-led inflation fears sap demand for Indian bonds
india_trends.summary: Separately, Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday ⁠urged Indians to ‌conserve fuel, resume work-from-home, limit non-essential overseas travel, cut ​cooking oil ​consumption and reduce fertiliser use as surging global energy ⁠prices pressure India's foreign exchange reserves.

india_trends.title: Mamaearth parent Honasa Consumer may become first new-age company to announce dividend
india_trends.summary: Honasa Consumer’s board will consider a final dividend on May 21 alongside Q4 FY26 results, potentially making Mamaearth’s parent the first listed new-age company to reward shareholders with a dividend amid improving stock performance and steady business growth expectations.

india_trends.title: Crude shock, Iran standoff drag Nifty below 24,000 to three-week low
india_trends.summary: Rising geopolitical tensions, concerns over India’s import bill and pressure on foreign exchange reserves weighed heavily on investor sentiment, even as defensive sectors like Pharma and Healthcare showed resilience.
